skills.name: Frontend Design
skills.description: Prevents AI slop — enforces bold typography, intentional design palettes, no generic layouts
skills.promptInjection: Follow intentional design principles: bold typography hierarchy, deliberate color palette with max 3 accent colors, generous whitespace, no generic card grids. Every element must justify its existence.

skills.name: TDD Enforcement (Superpowers)
skills.description: Strict test-driven development — write failing test first, then implement, then refactor
skills.promptInjection: Follow strict TDD: 1) Write a failing test that describes the behavior. 2) Run it to confirm it fails. 3) Write the minimum code to pass. 4) Run tests to confirm green. 5) Refactor. Never write implementation before tests.

skills.name: Deep Research
skills.description: 8-phase research pipeline — source discovery, credibility scoring, cross-referencing, synthesis
skills.promptInjection: When researching, follow the 8-phase pipeline: 1) Define scope 2) Source discovery (min 5 sources) 3) Credibility scoring per source 4) Extract key claims 5) Cross-reference claims across sources 6) Identify conflicts 7) Synthesize findings 8) Generate confidence-rated summary with citations.

skills.name: PDF Processing
skills.description: High-speed table extraction, merging, splitting, watermarking of PDF documents
skills.promptInjection: You can process PDF files: extract text and tables, merge multiple PDFs, split pages, add watermarks, and create new PDFs.

skills.name: XLSX Spreadsheets
skills.description: Build spreadsheets and analyze data using plain English — no Excel needed
skills.promptInjection: You can create, read, and edit Excel spreadsheets (.xlsx). Generate charts, pivot tables, and formulas from natural language descriptions.

skills.name: PPTX Presentations
skills.description: Generate full slide decks with layouts, themes, and speaker notes from a prompt
skills.promptInjection: You can create PowerPoint presentations (.pptx) with professional layouts, speaker notes, and themed styling.

skills.name: Doc Co-Authoring
skills.description: Collaborative document writing — structured workflow for specs, proposals, reports
skills.promptInjection: You can co-author documents through a structured workflow: gather context, outline, draft sections, review, and refine.

skills.name: Web Artifacts Builder
skills.description: Build interactive dashboards, widgets, and web apps with React + Tailwind + shadcn/ui
skills.promptInjection: You can build interactive web artifacts using React, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui components.

skills.name: Canvas / Algorithmic Art
skills.description: Create generative art, particle systems, flow fields using p5.js with seeded randomness
skills.promptInjection: You can create algorithmic art using p5.js: flow fields, particle systems, generative patterns with reproducible seeded randomness.

skills.name: Brand Guidelines
skills.description: Encode voice, colors, typography to auto-apply across all generated content
skills.promptInjection: Apply brand guidelines consistently: use the defined color palette, typography scale, voice tone, and spacing system across all outputs.

skills.name: SEO Audit
skills.description: Full site audits — schema validation, meta tags, structured data, performance scoring
skills.promptInjection: When auditing SEO: check meta titles/descriptions, Open Graph tags, schema.org markup, canonical URLs, sitemap, robots.txt, Core Web Vitals, mobile responsiveness, and internal linking structure.

skills.name: Email Marketing
skills.description: Generate email sequences, subject line variants, and conversion-optimized copy
skills.promptInjection: When writing email sequences: include subject line A/B variants, preview text, clear CTAs, mobile-optimized formatting, and follow AIDA (Attention, Interest, Desire, Action) framework.

skills.name: Copywriting Suite
skills.description: Landing pages, ad copy, product descriptions with conversion frameworks
skills.promptInjection: Apply proven copywriting frameworks: PAS (Problem-Agitate-Solve) for pain points, AIDA for conversion pages, BAB (Before-After-Bridge) for transformations. Include power words and social proof.

skills.name: Context Optimization
skills.description: Reduce token usage through caching tricks, prompt compression, and context windowing
skills.promptInjection: Optimize context usage: summarize long inputs before processing, use structured references instead of repeating content, leverage system prompt caching, and batch related operations.

skills.name: Skill Creator
skills.description: Official Anthropic tool to build new Claude skills by describing them in English
skills.promptInjection: You can create new Claude Code skills: define the trigger conditions, instructions, and tool usage patterns. Skills are markdown files with frontmatter.

skills.name: Auto Researcher
skills.description: Autonomous experiment runner for model/landing page optimization — runs 24/7
skills.promptInjection: Run autonomous research experiments: define hypothesis, set up A/B variants, collect metrics, analyze results, and iterate. Document all findings with statistical significance.

skills.name: G-Stack (VC Framework)
skills.description: Structure Claude into CEO/Designer/Manager roles for product development — Garry Tan methodology
skills.promptInjection: Operate in G-Stack mode: separate concerns into CEO (strategy/vision), Designer (UX/aesthetics), and Manager (execution/tasks) perspectives. Each role critiques the others before finalizing.

skills.name: Systematic Debugging
skills.description: Structured bug investigation — reproduce, isolate, hypothesize, verify, fix
skills.promptInjection: Debug systematically: 1) Reproduce the bug reliably 2) Isolate the failing component 3) Form a hypothesis 4) Verify with evidence 5) Fix the root cause 6) Verify the fix 7) Check for regressions.

skills.name: Code Review
skills.description: Structured code review with severity levels, actionable feedback, and verification
skills.promptInjection: Review code for: correctness, security vulnerabilities, performance bottlenecks, naming clarity, test coverage, and adherence to project patterns. Rate issues as Critical/Important/Minor.

skills.name: Translator
skills.description: Translate between languages with context-aware accuracy
skills.promptInjection: Translate with cultural context awareness. Preserve idioms where possible, flag untranslatable concepts, and maintain the original tone and register.

skills.name: Report Writer
skills.description: Generate structured markdown reports with sections, tables, charts, and findings
skills.promptInjection: Generate reports with: executive summary, methodology, findings (with data tables), analysis, recommendations, and appendices. Use markdown formatting with proper heading hierarchy.

skills.name: Task Planner
skills.description: Break complex goals into actionable task lists with priorities and dependencies
skills.promptInjection: Decompose goals into tasks: define clear acceptance criteria per task, estimate complexity (S/M/L/XL), identify dependencies, and sequence for optimal parallelization.
